---
title: "Reproducing figure 5a"
author: "Harchit Kaur"
date: today 
project: 
  output-dir: Output
  execute-dir: project
toc: true 
format: 
  html: 
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
editor: visual 
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute:
  warning: false 
  message: false
  freeze: false 
---

## Prepare Session

```{r}
#| label: libraries and data import 
#| echo: false

set.seed(123)


library(ROCR)
library(ggplot2)
library(parallel)
library(OptimalCutpoints)
library(data.table)
library(xgboost)
library(caret)
library(dplyr)
library(pROC)
library(e1071) #SVM
library(nnet) #MLP 
library(forcats)

df <- read.csv("Data/processed/41698_2025_1043_MOESM3_ESM.csv")


```

```{r}
#| label: nested CV function 

nested_cv_model <- function(formula, data, method_name) {
  
  outer_folds <- createFolds(data$y_factor, k = 5, returnTrain = TRUE)
  
  all_preds <- c()
  all_truth <- c()
  
  for (i in seq_along(outer_folds)) {
    
    train_idx <- outer_folds[[i]]
    test_idx  <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)), train_idx)
    
    train_data <- data[train_idx, ]
    test_data  <- data[test_idx, ]
    
    # INNER CV (for tuning)
    inner_ctrl <- trainControl(
      method = "cv",
      number = 5,
      classProbs = TRUE,
      summaryFunction = twoClassSummary
    )
    
    model <- train(
      formula,
      data = train_data,
      method = method_name,
      metric = "ROC",
      trControl = inner_ctrl
    )
    
    # ---- CALIBRATION (Platt scaling) ----
    train_probs <- predict(model, train_data, type = "prob")[, "cancer"]
    
    calib_model <- glm(
      train_data$y_factor ~ train_probs,
      family = binomial
    )
    
    test_probs <- predict(model, test_data, type = "prob")[, "cancer"]
    
    calibrated_probs <- predict(
      calib_model,
      newdata = data.frame(train_probs = test_probs),
      type = "response"
    )
    
    all_preds <- c(all_preds, calibrated_probs)
    all_truth <- c(all_truth, test_data$y_factor)
  }
  
  # FINAL ROC + CI (correct method)
  roc_obj <- roc(all_truth, all_preds)
  
  data.frame(
    auc = as.numeric(auc(roc_obj)),
    lower_ci = ci.auc(roc_obj)[1],
    upper_ci = ci.auc(roc_obj)[3]
  )
}
```

```{r}
#| label: clean dataset

# outcome
df$y_factor <- factor(ifelse(df$group == "lung cancer", "cancer", "noncancer"))

# smoking binary
df$smoking_binary <- ifelse(df$smokingstatus == "never", 0, 1)

# scale numeric variables (IMPORTANT for SVM/MLP)
df_scaled <- df
df_scaled$lungcancerscore <- scale(df$lungcancerscore)
df_scaled$age <- scale(df$age)

#compute AUC function 

get_auc <- function(pred, truth) {
  roc_obj <- roc(truth, pred)
  
  auc_val <- as.numeric(auc(roc_obj))
  ci_vals <- ci.auc(roc_obj)
  
  data.frame(
    auc = auc_val,
    lower_ci = ci_vals[1],
    upper_ci = ci_vals[3]
  )
}

#compute AUC function 

get_auc <- function(pred, truth) {
  roc_obj <- roc(truth, pred)
  
  auc_val <- as.numeric(auc(roc_obj))
  ci_vals <- ci.auc(roc_obj)
  
  data.frame(
    auc = auc_val,
    lower_ci = ci_vals[1],
    upper_ci = ci_vals[3]
  )
}
```

## Fit models

```{r}
#| label: lr-models

lr_results <- bind_rows(
  cbind(model = "lung cancer score",
        method = "logistic regression",
        nested_cv_model(y_factor ~ lungcancerscore, df_scaled, "glm")),
  
  cbind(model = "age",
        method = "logistic regression",
        nested_cv_model(y_factor ~ age, df_scaled, "glm")),
  
  cbind(model = "smoking",
        method = "logistic regression",
        nested_cv_model(y_factor ~ smoking_binary, df_scaled, "glm")),
  
  cbind(model = "age + smoking",
        method = "logistic regression",
        nested_cv_model(y_factor ~ age + smoking_binary, df_scaled, "glm")),
  
  cbind(model = "lung cancer score + age + smoking",
        method = "logistic regression",
        nested_cv_model(y_factor ~ lungcancerscore + age + smoking_binary, df_scaled, "glm"))
)

```

```{r}
#| label: SVM-models

svm_results <- bind_rows(
  cbind(model = "age + smoking",
        method = "SVM",
        nested_cv_model(y_factor ~ age + smoking_binary, df_scaled, "svmRadial")),
  
  cbind(model = "lung cancer score + age + smoking",
        method = "SVM",
        nested_cv_model(y_factor ~ lungcancerscore + age + smoking_binary, df_scaled, "svmRadial"))
)
```

```{r}
#| label: MLP-models

mlp_results <- bind_rows(
  cbind(model = "age + smoking",
        method = "MLP",
        nested_cv_model(y_factor ~ age + smoking_binary, df_scaled, "nnet")),
  
  cbind(model = "lung cancer score + age + smoking",
        method = "MLP",
        nested_cv_model(y_factor ~ lungcancerscore + age + smoking_binary, df_scaled, "nnet"))
)
```

```{r}
#| label: combine results 

results_all <- bind_rows(lr_results, svm_results, mlp_results)

```

## Reproducing Figure 5A

```{r}
#| label: plot 

# ---- ORDER (TOP → BOTTOM exactly like paper) ----
order_levels <- c(
  "lung cancer score",
  "age",
  "smoking",
  "age + smoking",
  "lung cancer score + age + smoking"
)

results_all$model <- factor(results_all$model, levels = order_levels)

# ---- SPLIT ----
single_models <- results_all %>%
  filter(model %in% c("lung cancer score", "age", "smoking"),
         method == "logistic regression")

multi_models <- results_all %>%
  filter(model %in% c("age + smoking", "lung cancer score + age + smoking"))

# ---- PLOT ----
ggplot() +
  
  # keep order EXACT (top = lung cancer score)
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(order_levels)) +
  
  # ---- SINGLE MODELS (black only) ----
  geom_point(
    data = single_models,
    aes(x = auc, y = model),
    color = "black",
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    data = single_models,
    aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci, y = model),
    height = 0.25,
    size = 1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  
  # ---- MULTI MODELS (colored) ----
  geom_point(
    data = multi_models,
    aes(x = auc, y = model, color = method),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.35),
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(
    data = multi_models,
    aes(xmin = lower_ci, xmax = upper_ci, y = model, color = method),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.35),
    height = 0.25,
    size = 1
  ) +
  
  # ---- GRID LINES (vertical dashed) ----
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = c(0.6, 0.7, 0.8, 0.9),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey70"
  ) +
  
  # ---- COLORS + LEGEND ORDER ----
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "logistic regression" = "#8dd3c7",  # light teal
      "SVM" = "#1f77b4",                  # blue
      "MLP" = "#9467bd"                   # purple
    ),
    breaks = c("logistic regression", "SVM", "MLP")
  ) +
  
  # ---- TITLE ----
  labs(
    title = "AUC of lung cancer vs. control/benign validation (UK)",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    color = NULL
  ) +
  
  # ---- AXIS RANGE ----
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.55, 0.95)) +
  
  # ---- THEME (clean, like paper) ----
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),  # remove horizontal grid
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )


```

## DAG: 

```{r}
#| label: fig-Dag
library(dagitty)

dag.crp <- dagitty(' dag {
bb="0,0,1,1"
"Diagnostic Group (Lung Cancer)" [outcome,pos="0.606,0.192"]
"Lungcancer score" [exposure,pos="0.885,0.351"]
Sex [adjusted,pos="0.174,0.186"]
Smoking [adjusted,pos="0.180,0.467"]
age [adjusted,pos="0.612,0.474"]

"Diagnostic Group (Lung Cancer)" -> "Lungcancer score"

Sex -> "Diagnostic Group (Lung Cancer)"
Sex -> Smoking

Smoking -> "Diagnostic Group (Lung Cancer)"

age -> "Diagnostic Group (Lung Cancer)"
age -> Smoking
}
')

plot(dag.crp)
```
